human_label: Child age 12 months up to 5 years
source_quote: Age 12 months up to 5 years: 40bpm ormore

human_label: Child age 2 months up to 12 months
source_quote: Age 2 months up to 12 months: 50bpm ormore

human_label: Child age 2 months up to 3 years
source_quote: Age 2 months up to 3 years - 1 tablet

human_label: Child age 2 months up to 6 months
source_quote: Age 2 months up to 6 months - half tablet

human_label: Child age 3 years up to 5 years
source_quote: Age 3 years up to 5 years - 2 tablet

human_label: Child age 6 months up to 5 years
source_quote: Age 6 months up to 5 years - 1 tablet

threshold_expression: p_cough_14_days_or_more == true OR p_diarrhoea_14_days_or_more == true OR q_blood_in_stool == true OR p_fever_7_days_or_more == true OR q_convulsions == true OR q_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR q_vomits_everything == true OR ex_chest_indrawing == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true OR v_muac_strap_colour == 'red' OR ex_swelling_both_feet == true
human_label: Any danger sign present
source_quote: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY to health facility

human_label: Child can drink
source_quote: If child can drink

human_label: Cough for 14 days or more (danger sign)
source_quote: Cough for 14 days ormore

human_label: Diarrhoea for 14 days or more (danger sign)
source_quote: Diarrhoea for 14 days or more

threshold_expression: q_has_diarrhoea == true AND q_diarrhoea_duration_days < 14 AND q_blood_in_stool == false AND p_any_danger_sign == false
human_label: Diarrhoea treatable at home (<14 days, no blood, no danger sign)
source_quote: If Diarrhoea (less than 14 days AND no blood in stool)

threshold_expression: q_has_cough == true AND p_fast_breathing_threshold == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false AND p_any_danger_sign == false
human_label: Fast breathing treatable at home (cough + fast breathing, no chest indrawing, no danger sign)
source_quote: If fast breathing

threshold_expression: (p_age_2mo_to_12mo == true AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 50) OR (p_age_12mo_to_5yr == true AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 40)
human_label: Fast breathing for age
source_quote: Age 2 months up to 12 months: 50bpm ormore Age 12 months up to 5 years: 40bpm ormore

human_label: Fever for 7 days or more (danger sign)
source_quote: Fever for last 7 days or more

threshold_expression: q_has_fever == true AND q_fever_duration_days < 7 AND hx_malaria_area == true AND p_any_danger_sign == false
human_label: Fever treatable at home (<7 days, malaria area, no danger sign)
source_quote: Fever (less than 7 days) in a malaria area

threshold_expression: q_has_fever == true AND (q_convulsions == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true OR q_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR q_vomits_everything == true)
human_label: Fever with convulsions/unconscious/unable to drink/vomits everything
source_quote: If Fever AND Convulsions or Unusually sleepy or unconscious or Not able to drink or feed anything or Vomits everything

human_label: MUAC strap red - severe malnutrition
source_quote: RED reading on the MUAC strap indicates severe malnutrition

human_label: MUAC strap yellow - moderate malnutrition
source_quote: Yellow on MUAC strap: Counsel caregiver on feeding

human_label: RDT negative for malaria
source_quote: Negative

human_label: RDT positive for malaria
source_quote: If RDT is positive, give oral antimalarial AL
